dict.string: Drift reads your weight, activity, sleep, and heart rate data from Apple Health to track your health trends. All data stays on your device.
Drift does not write to Apple Health. This permission is not requested.
Drift uses the camera to scan food barcodes and snap meal photos for Photo Log identification.
Drift needs access to your photo library so you can pick a meal photo for Photo Log identification. Photos are only sent to the cloud AI provider you configured; Drift never sees them.
Drift needs microphone access for voice input in AI chat. Audio is processed on-device and never leaves your phone.
Drift uses speech recognition to let you log food, exercise, and health data by voice. All recognition happens on your device.
